description_long: This is a modern, three-seat bench with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a continuous orange seat surface divided into three sections. The seat is supported by two robust, dark-colored metal legs at each end, which are anchored to the ground with wide, flat bases for stability. A thin, metallic rail runs along the back, supported by three vertical rods, providing a minimal backrest for each seat section. The bench lacks armrests, emphasizing its open and accessible design. The materials appear to be a combination of powder-coated metal for the frame and legs, and a molded plastic or composite material for the seat. Its streamlined form and durable construction make it suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as bus stops, train stations, or public parks.
description: A modern, three-seat bench with an orange molded seat, dark metal legs, and a minimal metallic back rail, designed for public urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three orange seat sections, the minimal metallic back rail, and the sturdy dark metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bench's slim profile, the curvature of the seat, and the vertical support rods for the back rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back rail, the division of the seat into three sections, and the full width of the bench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the seat's curvature and the supporting structure of the legs and back rail.
attribute_leg_design: two wide, flat, dark metal supports at each end
